description_long: This imposing gatehouse features a multi-tiered, pagoda-style roof with green tiles and ornate golden crest decorations on the uppermost levels. The structure is primarily constructed from stone at its base, transitioning to dark wooden beams and supports as it rises. The entryway is a small, protruding canopy with a matching green tiled roof, providing shelter above a central arched opening. The upper stories are characterized by wide, overhanging eaves and intricate wooden detailing, typical of East Asian architecture. The windows are small and symmetrically placed, blending into the dark wood and roof elements. The overall appearance is both grand and fortified, suggesting a ceremonial or defensive function at the entrance to a larger complex.
description: A grand, multi-tiered East Asian gatehouse with green tiled roofs, golden crests, and a stone base, featuring ornate wooden detailing and a central arched entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate entryway, golden crest decorations, and layered green roofs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad stone base and the full expanse of the green tiled roof without visible entry.
description_view_2: Front view similar to view 0, emphasizing the symmetry and decorative elements of the gatehouse.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to view 1, showing the stone base and the overhanging roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched stone entry with a small green-tiled canopy roof.
attribute_window_placement: Small, symmetrically placed windows on upper levels near the roofline.
